channel.title: GitHub Astro Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Astro in GitHub

item.title: onwidget/astrowind
item.description: ⭕️ AstroWind: A free template using Astro 5 and Tailwind CSS. Astro starter theme.

item.title: ColorlibHQ/AdminLTE
item.description: AdminLTE - Free admin dashboard template based on Bootstrap 5

item.title: danielcgilibert/blog-template
item.description: 📚 Openblog is an elegant, simple, and user-friendly blog. Focused on accessibility, SEO and performance.

item.title: saicaca/fuwari
item.description: ✨A static blog template built with Astro.

item.title: zeon-studio/astroplate
item.description: Astroplate is a free starter template built with Astro, TailwindCSS & TypeScript providing everything you need to jumpstart your Astro project. Get started with Astroplate and save yourself hours of work!

item.title: manuelernestog/astrofy
item.description: Astrofy is a free and open-source template for your Personal Portfolio Website built with Astro and TailwindCSS. Create in minutes a website with Blog, CV, Project Section, Store and RSS Feed.

item.title: m6v3l9/astro-theme-stone
item.description: Stone is a free and open-source Astro theme specially designed for Business, Marketing, SaaS and Startup websites.

item.title: chrismwilliams/astro-theme-cactus
item.description: A simple Astro theme. Use it to create your blog or website.

item.title: satnaing/astro-paper
item.description: A minimal, accessible and SEO-friendly Astro blog theme

item.title: nas5w/interview-guide
item.description: An opinionated, actionable guide for software engineering interviews.
